title: Order Fill Watcher — Execution Management Layer
summary: Background daemon thread that monitors a PENDING limit buy order after placement and chases price upward in configurable steps to secure a fill. Cancels if the price ceiling or max attempts are exhausted — prevents stale signals from sitting open indefinitely. Rule-based (no AI calls) for execution speed.
approach: New fill_watcher.py module with FillWatcher class (per-symbol daemon thread) and stop_watcher() registry. Integrated into execute_buy() (start), execute_sell() (stop), and _flatten_all_inner() (stop-all). Config block added to config.py with 6 tunable params. All state transitions logged to audit_log.jsonl as fill_watcher_* events.
notes: Rule-based by design. Full AI-powered execution agent planned for Phase 3 (before live trading). See feat-execution-agent spec.
